title: implementing_artifact
description: Artifact produced by the implementing room: a record of the edits the oracle applied to the bugfix worktree.

summary_title.description: One-line description of what was implemented.

summary_markdown.description: Markdown narrative of the edits applied — what changed in each file and why. Posted to the transport at the testing checkpoint.

files_changed.description: Every file path the oracle actually edited (or attempted to edit), relative to the worktree.

applied.description: True if every required edit was made successfully; false if the oracle hit a blocker before completing the proposal.

blockers.description: Populated when applied=false. Each entry describes one reason an edit couldn't be made (file not found, conflict, ambiguous match, etc).

notes.description: Optional free-form notes the oracle wants to leave for the testing-room reviewer.
